description: Example action schema used by the LLM-enabled humanoid robot system.
validation_rules: The tool name must exist in allowed_tools.
handover_object requires a target object or target location depending on the task context.
handover_object requires the robot to be holding an object before physical handover execution.
Unsafe or unsupported actions must be rejected.
If the target object is not visible, the Controller may request search_object before pick_object.
The Controller must check robot state before allowing physical execution.
